name: Halloween: Cool Whip Grave Yard Dessert
recipeIngredient: 12 oz tub Cool Whip Lite® topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 9 x 13 x 2 inches pan with cooking spray and flour.
3. To prepare crust, combine cookie crumbs, granulated sugar, and melted margarine in a small mixing bowl. Press firmly into prepared pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes and chill.
5. To prepare filling, combine cream cheese, remaining sugar, and half cup Cool Whip in a mixing bowl.
6. In another mixing bowl, dissolve gelatin with boiling water until completely dissolved.
7. Mix cold water and ice cubes together to make 1 1/2 cups.
8. Stir the ice water into the gelatin mixture until thickened.
9. Remove any remaining ice cubes.
10. Spoon the gelatin over the cream cheese layer.
11. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until firm.
12. Spread remaining Cool Whip over the gelatin layer.
13. Sprinkle with additional cookie crumbs.
14. Decorate as a "grave yard" by poking sandwich cookies into the dessert.
15. Decorate the cookies as tombstones with decorator icing.
16. Scatter candy and pumpkins around the surface.
